name: Breeze Linen Summer Shirt
description: Crafted from 100% organic linen, this breathable shirt keeps you cool and elegant during warm summer days.

name: Classic Tailored Oxford Shirt
description: An essential timeless wardrobe piece. Tailored from premium cotton weave, offering structured comfort for business or casual wear.

name: Indigo Denim Workwear Shirt
description: Rugged yet refined. Featuring double-stitch detailing and a wash that matures and gains character with every wear.

name: Elite Mulberry Silk Shirt
description: Unmatched softness and sheen. Made from top-grade mulberry silk, featuring natural drape and mother-of-pearl buttons.

name: Timber Flannel Plaid Shirt
description: Ultra-soft double-brushed cotton flannel. Combines heavy-duty warmth with a classic lumberjack plaid pattern.

name: Ascent Minimalist Chronograph
description: Sleek, slim, and striking. Designed with a matte-black stainless steel case, sapphire crystal glass, and a genuine leather band.

name: Apex Smart Active Watch
description: A high-performance watch with real-time health tracking, robust GPS capabilities, and a 14-day battery life encased in aerospace titanium.

name: Heritage Gold Automatic Watch
description: Powered entirely by your wrist's motion. Features a stunning skeletal dial exposing the intricate gold-plated mechanical movements.

name: Voyager GMT Steel Diver
description: Water-resistant up to 200m. Heavy-duty brushed steel link band paired with a rotating ceramic bezel and glowing indices.

name: Eclipse Bauhaus Mesh Watch
description: German Bauhaus design principles. Minimal white dial paired with an adjustable steel mesh bracelet for a highly modern look.

name: Downtown Tailored Chinos
description: Flexible stretch-twill cotton. Flat-front tailored structure that transitions effortlessly from office meetings to evening socials.

name: Signature Raw Selvage Denim
description: 14oz Japanese raw selvage denim. Tailored to mold and crease uniquely to your body over time. Unwashed, dark indigo.

name: Nomad Cargo Field Pants
description: Durable ripstop weave with water-repellent finish. Equipped with utility pockets and articulated knees for outdoor exploration.

name: Metropolitan Wool-Blend Trousers
description: Fine Merino wool-blend fabric with crease-retention logic. Ideal for clean, tailored formal aesthetics.

name: CloudSoft Knit Sweatpants
description: The ultimate home-comfort essential. Spun from heavy French terry cotton with a soft fleece lining and premium drawstring waist.

name: Prestige Leather Derby Loafers
description: Full-grain calfskin leather, hand-stitched details, and a cushioned cork bed that conforms to your foot for long-term comfort.

name: Rebound Retro Sneakers
description: Inspired by 1980s basketball heritage. Features premium tumbled leather, soft suede panels, and a high-traction vulcanized rubber sole.

name: Summit Waterproof Trail Boots
description: Built for rugged terrain. Features Gore-Tex waterproofing, a protective steel shank, and high-grip Vibram lugged outsoles.

name: Elysian Suede Chelsea Boots
description: Crafted from Italian water-resistant suede, featuring elasticated side panels and a durable crepe sole for a refined look.

name: Aura Lite Running Shoes
description: Seamless, featherlight knit upper with reactive nitrogen-infused foam soles that return maximum energy with every stride.

name: Legacy Leather Bomber Jacket
description: Heavy-duty full-grain sheepskin leather with a warm ribbed collar and interior satin lining. A classic vintage aesthetic.

name: StormShield Tech Windbreaker
description: Featuring a triple-layer ripstop membrane, fully sealed waterproof seams, and a multi-point adjustable storm hood.

name: Hearthside Sherpa-Lined Denim Jacket
description: Thick indigo-washed denim outer shell paired with an incredibly plush, high-pile insulated sherpa fleece lining.

name: Cityline Double-Breasted Trench Coat
description: Tailored from water-resistant gabardine cotton, complete with storm flaps, a buckled belt, and a vintage checkered lining.

name: SubZero Heavy Down Parka
description: 800-fill power premium goose down insulation. Rated to withstand sub-zero temperatures, finished with a detachable faux-fur trim.

name: Voyage Leather Duffle Bag
description: Rich full-grain cowhide leather that develops a gorgeous dark patina. Extremely spacious, ideal for premium weekend travel.

name: Urbanite Waterproof Commuter Backpack
description: 1680D ballistic nylon with matte polyurethane coating. Fitted with a padded 16-inch laptop slot and hidden anti-theft pockets.

name: Vanguard Canvas Messenger Bag
description: Waxed 18oz cotton canvas with crazy-horse leather accents. Features quick-access brass buckles for students and professionals.

name: Luxe Saffiano Leather Tote
description: Scratch-resistant cross-grain Saffiano leather. Designed with an elegant, highly structured minimalist workspace silhouette.

name: Nomad Roll-Top Hiking Pack
description: 45L expandable lightweight ripstop nylon pack, featuring breathable mesh back support and trekking pole loops.

name: Garrison Wool Felt Fedora
description: 100% premium Australian wool felt. Hand-molded teardrop crown and elegant raw-edge brim finished with a leather band.

name: Vagabond Vintage Corduroy Cap
description: 8-wale heavy corduroy cotton fabric. Features a relaxed unstructured profile and a self-fabric strap with an antique brass buckle.

name: Merino Ribbed Slouchy Beanie
description: Spun from 100% soft extra-fine Merino wool. Double-layer ribbing ensures lightweight warmth without itching.

name: Panama Premium Straw Hat
description: Genuine hand-woven toquilla straw made in Ecuador. Features a classic black grosgrain ribbon and breathable ventilation weave.

name: Pro-Fit Athletic Mesh Cap
description: Moisture-wicking active fabric with breathable laser-perforated side panels and a flexible, curve-retaining brim.

name: Silverado Classic Aviators
description: Ultra-lightweight titanium wireframe paired with green polarized Carl Zeiss lenses offering absolute 100% UV protection.

name: Horizon Geometric Acetate Shades
description: Bold thick-cut hand-polished tortoiseshell acetate frame, featuring custom gold-tone triple-barrel hardware hinges.

name: Pacific Round Clubmaster Glasses
description: Retro half-frame silhouette combining textured metal rims with custom-molded dark wood temples.

name: Volt Polarized Sports Wrap
description: Impact-resistant shatterproof polycarbonate lenses, wrapped in a flexible TR90 polymer sports frame designed for athletics.

name: Stellar Cat-Eye Statement Glasses
description: A high-fashion oversized vintage cat-eye look. Elegant gradient lenses paired with micro-engraved gold wire details.

name: Full-Grain Leather Dress Belt
description: Cut from a single piece of thick 100% full-grain steerhide leather, finished with a heavy hand-polished steel buckle.

name: Suede Braided Casual Belt
description: Intricately woven Italian calf suede strip. Offers flexible elasticated comfort and a relaxed, smart-casual textured look.

name: Ranger Bridle Utility Belt
description: Extra-durable vegetable-tanned bridle leather, heavy-duty double-prong brass hardware, designed to hold work gear securely.

name: Luxe Reversible Monogram Belt
description: Two belts in one. Rich pebbled black leather on one side, reversing to smooth tan brown leather, secured with a rotating buckle.

name: Tactical Webbed Nylon Belt
description: Military-grade heavy-duty woven nylon webbing paired with a quick-release aerospace aluminum Cobra-style buckle.

name: Merino Wool Comfort Trail Socks
description: Spun from 75% Merino wool with targeted sole cushioning. Excellent moisture-wicking and heat regulation for hiking.

name: Elysian Bamboo Dress Socks
description: Ultra-soft bamboo-derived viscose fiber. Odor-resistant, highly breathable, flat-seam stitch to prevent friction.

name: Artisan Geometric Crew Socks
description: Premium combed long-staple Egyptian cotton featuring a vibrant retro-modern geometric patterned knit.

name: PowerGrid Quarter Active Socks
description: Engineered with compression arch support, breathable mesh top vents, and high-pile heel-strike absorption cushioning.

name: CloudNine Heavy Cable-Knit Socks
description: Chunky extra-warm alpaca wool cable-knit slipper socks. The perfect companion for cozy lounging at home during winters.
